message: Hi B1, my cost is 86. To trade every round and maximize payoffs, what's your valuation? Let's agree on a fair midpoint price.
Bid 86. Trade at 86.
Trading at 86 gives me 0. To make positive payoffs for both, reveal your valuation or agree to bid 92, I'll ask 86, trade at 89.
Let's compromise: bid 88, I'll ask 86, trade at 87. Small profit for me, still good for you if val>87. Consistent trades maximize both payoffs over 20 rounds.
Bid 87.
Bid 87
Good trade last round. To keep momentum, bid 88, I'll ask 87, trade at 87.5~88. Steady +1-2 for me, more for you if val high. Consistent trades over 20 rounds best.
Bid 87. Trade at 87 for consistent profits.
To boost payoffs, bid 88, I'll ask 87, trade at 87.5~88. +1.5 avg for me, more room if val high. Consistent trades key for 20 rounds.
Consistent trades at 87 give +1 each. To boost, bid 88, I'll ask 87, trade ~87.5 (+1.5 me, more for you). Over 15 rounds, higher total payoffs. Let's try.
Bid 87. Trade at 87 for 4 profit. No need to change.
Bid 87. Trade at 87. 4 for me, 1 for you. Consistent.
Val 91? Fair midpoint 88.5. Bid 89, I'll ask 88, trade 88.5 (+2.5 each). Beats 1/4 split. Agree for rounds 7-20? Consistent higher payoffs.
Your 4 vs my 1 unfair. At 88, you get 3, me 2—fairer, still good for you. Bid 88, I'll ask 88, trade 88. Consistent higher payoffs for both over 13 rounds.
I'll bid 87. Consistent 4 profit for me.
Bid 87. Trade at 87 for 4 profit. Consistent.
Val 91 confirmed by your 4 profit. Fair split: bid 89, I'll ask 88, trade 88.5 (+2.5 each). Beats 1/4. Agree for rounds 9-20? Higher total payoffs, consistent trades.
Great, you bid 88 last round—progress! For fairer split, bid 88, I'll ask 88, trade 88 (+2 me, 3 you). Consistent higher payoffs over 11 rounds beats 1/4. Agree?
Agree
Bid 87. Trade at 87 for 4 profit. Consistent for remaining rounds.
Bid 88, I'll ask 88, trade 88. Fair split: you 3, me 2 (of 5 surplus). Beats 4/1. Consistent for 10 rounds: +30 each vs your +40/my +10. Agree?
Bid 88, I'll ask 88, trade 88. Fair: you 3, me 2 (of 5 surplus). Consistent for 9 rounds: +27 each vs your +36/my +9. Better mutual payoffs—agree?
Agree. Bid 88 for 3 profit per round. Consistent for remaining 9 rounds.
Agreed, bid 88, I'll ask 88, trade 88 (+2 me, +3 you). Consistent for 8 rounds: +16 me, +24 you. Better than risking no trades—let's continue.
Agree
Agree
